mapper.sql: select menu_id, menu_name, parent_id, order_num, path, component, query, is_frame, is_cache, menu_type, visible, status, ifnull(perms,'') as perms, icon, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from sys_menu
mapper.select: select distinct ifnull(m.perms, '') from sys_menu m left join sys_role_menu rm on m.menu_id = rm.menu_id left join sys_user_role ur on rm.role_id = ur.role_id left join sys_role r on r.role_id = rm.role_id where m.status = '0' and m.del_flag = '0' and r.status = '0' and ur.user_id = #{userId}

where menu_type in ('M', 'C') and menu_id in ( select m.menu_id from sys_menu m left join sys_role_menu rm on m.menu_id = rm.menu_id left join sys_user_role ur on rm.role_id = ur.role_id left join sys_role r on r.role_id = rm.role_id where m.status = '0' and m.del_flag = '0' and r.status = '0' and ur.user_id = #{userId} ) and del_flag = '0' order by parent_id, order_num
select distinct ifnull(perms, '') from sys_menu where status = '0' and del_flag = '0' and perms is not null and perms != ''
select count(1) from sys_menu where del_flag = '0' and parent_id = #{parentId}
where menu_name=#{menuName} and parent_id = #{parentId} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
select case when count(1) > 0 then true else false end from sys_menu where del_flag = '0' and parent_id = #{menuId}
